sources.title: Poltergeist Activity (HORROR full movie based on true events, full length horror movies new)

metadata.Plot: A young family are visited by ghosts in their home. At first the ghosts appear friendly, moving objects around the house to the amusement of everyone, then they turn nasty and start to terrorise the family before they "kidnap" the youngest daughter.
metadata.Writer: Steven Spielberg, Michael Grais, Mark Victor
metadata.Actors: JoBeth Williams, Heather O'Rourke, Craig T. Nelson
metadata.Awards: Nominated for 3 Oscars. 5 wins & 9 nominations total
